content.en:
"Go, kill those Dao Ancestor incarnations!"

Jiong gave orders to these puppets who had been controlled and transformed, and said.

These puppets have been transformed by the Red Dragon Pool, and their physical bodies are not known how many times stronger, although their control over the Great Dao has weakened, but with their powerful physical bodies and divine powers, their combat power is not weaker than that of the weaker True Monarch Bang True Monarch.

What's more, these puppets are not afraid of death, and their recovery power is very terrifying, even if they are beaten into countless pieces, as long as the energy on their bodies is not exhausted, they can be restored in an instant, just like immortal bodies.

It was precisely because of this immortal ability that the puppet legion under the command of the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor was enough to deter countless powerhouses, and even attract the attention of the high-level of the domain realm.

There are only a few puppets comparable to the True Monarch List, even if there are more of them, it is difficult to kill a Dao Ancestor incarnation, but Jiong is really optimistic about those half-step True Ancestor level puppets.

That's right, Luohai Zhenjun and several other half-step True Ancestors also entered the Red Dragon Pool, and they still couldn't avoid the fate of being transformed.

Originally, Luohai Zhenjun and the others were very powerful, but now after the transformation of the Red Dragon Pool, their physical bodies are very powerful, and their combat power far surpasses that of before, and they are even comparable to some True Ancestors who have been promoted by True Monarchs.

In other words, the current strength of Luohai Zhenjun and the others is already equivalent to that of a genius true ancestor.

However, due to the forcible arrival of several Dao Ancestor incarnations on the battlefield ruins, it was difficult to exert the strength of the True Ancestor, and the level of incarnation cultivation still belonged to the half-step True Ancestor.

Therefore, it is really possible for these puppets to kill the Dao Ancestor incarnation.

Boom Boom Boom !!!!

A large number of True Monarch puppets appeared, attracting the attention of many True Monarchs.

"Oh my God, what's going on?"

"These true monarchs have a wrong breath, their eyes are emitting red light, what a weird aura!"

"Luohai Zhenjun is the same with them, they are half-step true ancestors, how did they become like this?"

"You see, these true monarchs all came out of the Red Dragon Pool, and there is definitely something wrong with the Red Dragon Pool!"

"It's a good thing I didn't enter the Red Dragon Pool, otherwise I would have become one of them!"

"It's not good, the spirit of the Red Dragon Dojo is really uneasy and kind, and he actually controls these True Monarchs, go, hurry up!"

A Ming Zhenjun sped away, trying to leave the dojo.

However, at this time, Jiong had already closed the ban, and the ban on the medicine garden that had been broken by Lanyue Dao Ancestor had also begun to recover.

As a result, these true monarchs can't leave at all now.

At this time, several Dao Ancestor incarnations met with human puppets.

-----------

"Luohai Zhenjun, Jinluan Zhenjun, Violent Bear Zhenjun! What are you doing?"

Tumen Dao Ancestor roared angrily.

At this moment, he saw that these three half-step True Ancestors led many True Monarchs to surround them, and they launched an attack as soon as they came up, which was simply provoking them, Dao Ancestors.

If the real body came, one look from him would be enough to kill them in an instant.

But now, he is just the incarnation of the Dao Ancestor, and his strength is very good, although he still won't take these half-step True Ancestors in his eyes, but at least he can't ignore them.

"They're being controlled!"

Lanyue Daozu said softly.

The Dao Ancestor incarnations were not stupid, and naturally they soon discovered that something was wrong with these True Monarchs, they had been completely controlled, and it could even be said that they had become another person.

"Kill!"

Luohai Zhenjun's eyes were red and bright, and he turned into an extremely terrifying giant, holding a huge trident and slashing at Lanyue Dao Ancestor.

"Look for death!"

Lanyue Dao Ancestor was furious, and pointed at it casually, preparing to kill him with one blow regardless of his identity as a disciple of the Chaos Trading Company of the True Monarch of the Falling Sea.

After all, the Falling Sea True Monarch has been controlled by the Red Dragon Dojo, and he is no longer the Falling Sea True Monarch, and he is also attacking him, the Dao Ancestor, even if he kills him, the Chaos Trading House will not come to trouble him.

According to Lanyue Dao Ancestor's estimation, with the power of his fingers, it is enough to kill a half-step true ancestor like the Falling Sea True Monarch, after all, the Falling Sea True Monarch is not too powerful, not the kind of True Monarch who is very against the sky.

But soon, Lanyue Dao Ancestor's color changed.

Rumble!!!

One of the fingers of the Lanyue Dao Ancestor collided with the trident of the Luohai True Monarch, and a terrifying force extended from the trident, and even broke one of the fingers of the Lanyue Dao Ancestor.

I saw a little red on Lanyue Dao Ancestor's fingers, and he was suddenly hit by the trident that broke through the skin defense, although it was only a minor injury, which meant that Luohai Zhenjun had injured him.

A half-step True Ancestor actually injured him, the Dao Ancestor incarnation, you must know that his incarnation cultivation is also a half-step True Ancestor!

With the power of the Great Dao and the Divine Power Secret Technique he mastered, it was a huge shame that he would be injured by a small half-step True Ancestor.

On the other side, the incarnations of the three Great Ancestors of Tumen Dao Ancestor, Mengyue Dao Ancestor, and Fengbo Dao Ancestor also suffered one after another, because they also underestimated these half-step True Ancestor puppets.

Then.

Jiong also launched the formation of the Red Dragon Dojo and began to suppress the Four Great Dao Ancestor incarnations, trying to keep the Four Great Dao Ancestor incarnations here forever.

Meanwhile.

True monarch-level puppets appeared inside the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor, and they were real puppets, not human puppets.

These puppets are the only remaining puppets in the Red Dragon Dojo today, and the strength of each puppet is comparable to that of the top True Monarchs, although they cannot match the True Monarch List, but as long as the number is sufficient, it is enough to kill the True Monarch List.

Tens of thousands of puppets were dispatched, and there were ten broken True Ancestor-level puppets.

Originally, the Red Dragon Dojo was far more than ten True Ancestor-level puppets, but in the battle when the domain boundary was shattered, the foundation of the Red Dragon Dojo was almost destroyed, and more True Ancestor-level puppets were taken away by the Red Dragon Dojo, and these ten True Ancestor-level puppets were still repaired after a long period of time before they could be used.

Originally, the strength of a truly perfect True Ancestor-level puppet was comparable to that of a true ancestor in the late stage of the Great Dao, but now it can only give full play to the true ancestor in the early stage of the Great Dao, and its strength is second only to the transformed human puppet Luohai True Monarch.

The purpose of these puppets was not to assist the puppets in killing the four Great Dao Ancestor incarnations, but to attack other True Monarchs, preparing to forcibly capture these True Monarchs, and then send them to the Red Dragon Pool to forcibly transform and control them.

Suddenly, the entire dojo was full of fighting and fighting.

Compared with the True Monarch puppets, the True Monarchs present were really too weak, and many True Monarchs couldn't compete at all, so they were captured by the True Monarch puppets and sent to the Red Dragon Pool for transformation.

Now, Jiong no longer hides his purpose.

And Ye Tian was taken care of, and two True Ancestor puppets were killing him, obviously Jiong hated him more.

Ye Tian was not afraid of these two True Ancestor-level puppets at all, but he would not immediately burst out with all his strength, otherwise Jiong would definitely take more care of him.

As a result, he only exerted part of his strength and entangled with these two True Ancestor-level puppets.

The real battlefield still belongs to the incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors.

The strength of the Red Dragon Dojo is indeed not weak, but Ye Tian feels that the strength of the Dao Ancestor incarnations is stronger, and the foundation is stronger, the strength of the Red Dragon Dojo is insufficient, and there is little hope of victory.

After all, the Red Dragon Dojo is only resisting under the control of a spirit now, and unless the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor appears, the ending will not change at all.
